title: vitis labrusca f. alba
intro: Vitis labrusca f. alba, also known as the White Fox Grape, is a variety of the Vitis labrusca species, a type of grapevine native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Vitis labrusca f. alba include its ability to promote digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Vitis labrusca f. alba include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, headaches, and menstrual cramps.
